_comment: Template for adding an Adapter task to a workflow. Task ID should be a short hex string (e.g., 303c). Task name MUST come from the task palette. IMPORTANT: Always add an error transition for adapter tasks — without one, errors cause 'Job has no available transitions' and the job gets stuck. Example transitions: {"303c": {"b647": {"type": "standard", "state": "success"}, "err1": {"type": "standard", "state": "error"}}} where err1 is an error handler task (e.g., newVariable to set error status). If both success and error need to go to workflow_end, you CANNOT use duplicate keys in JSON — route error to an intermediate task first.
